REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS DENIED. THIS PETITION IS FILED WITHIN AN ACTION TO WHICH SOME OF THE PARTIES TO THE ARBITRATION AND TO THE AGREEMENT GIVING RISE TO THE ARBITRATION PROCEEDING, ARE NOT ALSO PARTIES. (E.G. SIMONE CHIANG, INDIVIDUALLY; WILLIAM TSENG, INDIVIDUALLY; WILLIAM TSENG, AS TRUSTEE OF 2004 TRUST; WILLIAM TSENG AS TRUSTEE OF 2018 TRUST). NO AUTHORITY OR ARGUMENT IS PROVIDED FOR THE PROCEDURAL PROPRIETY OF SUCH PETITION. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO CHANGE CAPTION AND COURT RECORD IS DENIED. THIS MOTION IS NOT SUPPORTED BY ANY AUTHORITIES. THE COURT FURTHER NOTES THAT PLAINTIFF APPARENTLY SEEKS TO ONLY CHANGE THE CAPTION OF THE CASE, BUT NOT THE ALLEGATIONS IN THE OPERATIVE VERIFIED AMENDED COMPLAINT, WHICH INTER ALIA INCLUDE PARAGRAPH 5: "PLAINTIFF THE WILLIAM TSENG LIVING TRUST DATED JUNE 3, 2004 (THE "TSENG TRUST"), IS A 19% MEMBER OF THE COMPANY." JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Caption And Court Record
Off Calendar Oct-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF SVSP, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, SIMONE CHIANG, WILLIAM TSENG Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Caption And Court Record is DENIED. This motion is not supported by any authorities. The Court further notes that Plaintiff apparently seeks to only change the caption of the case, but not the allegations in the operative verified amended complaint, which inter alia include paragraph 5: "Plaintiff the William Tseng Living Trust dated June 3, 2004 (the "Tseng Trust"), is a 19% member of the Company."

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF SVSP, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, SIMONE CHIANG, WILLIAM TSENG Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is DENIED. This petition is filed within an action to which some of the parties to the Arbitration and to the Agreement giving rise to the arbitration proceeding, are not also parties. (e.g. Simone Chiang, individually; William Tseng, individually; William Tseng, as trustee of 2004 Trust; William Tseng as Trustee of 2018 Trust). No authority or argument is provided for the procedural propriety of such petition.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
